bottom_line: Harden QV retry semantics so deterministic failures trigger targeted fix-cycles, while likely flakes auto-retry once before opening a blocker.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (iw db-identity check: UP). Reviewed all step/fix logs under ai-dev/logs for CR-00089. No log exceeded 1 MB; large S11/S12 logs were analyzed via targeted grep with line anchors and focused reads around failure summaries.

findings.title: QV gates were repeatedly re-executed after already passing
findings.recommendation: Deduplicate already-passed QV reruns unless upstream file changes match the gate relevance filter.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Prevent redundant reruns of already-passed QV gates unless relevant upstream files changed; observed in CR-00089 self-assess report (ai-dev/work/CR-00089/reports/CR-00089_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Flake-like unit/integration failures triggered full expensive retries
findings.recommendation: Add one-shot automatic retry classification for known flaky signatures before escalating to manual fix-cycle.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add QV flake-aware one-shot auto-retry heuristics for unit/integration gates to reduce false failures; observed in CR-00089 self-assess report (ai-dev/work/CR-00089/reports/CR-00089_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Fix-cycle guidance allowed premature out-of-scope blocker on unstable integration mismatch
findings.recommendation: Update fix-cycle prompt template to require one confirmatory rerun for migration-head mismatch failures before declaring blocker.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00089_S12_fix3.log:37 — 'expected Alembic head revision ... actual head ...'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Tighten fix-cycle prompt policy to require one confirmatory rerun before declaring migration-head mismatch blockers; observed in CR-00089 self-assess report (ai-dev/work/CR-00089/reports/CR-00089_self_assess_report.md).
